title: The 4 Skills That Make You Better at Using AI
titleCandidates: The 4 Skills That Make You Better at Using AI
Stop Measuring AI Skill by Prompting: Use the 4D Loop
AI Fluency Explained: Delegation, Description, Discernment, Diligence
description:
AI fluency is not measured by prompt complexity or daily usage. This video gives you a practical 4D loop for choosing the AI role, describing the job, evaluating evidence, and governing real-world use.

What you'll learn:
- How Delegation, Description, Discernment, and Diligence work as one chain
- How to repair the real weak link instead of endlessly rewriting a prompt
- How to use a zero-to-two 4D scorecard before expanding AI authority

Chapters:
00:00 Preface
00:58 Delegation
02:39 Description
04:23 Discernment
06:07 Diligence
07:56 4D Loop
09:42 Scorecard
11:16 Summary

Follow Tiny Agent. Tiny Agent helps you get better at using AI.

#AIFluency #AISkills #HumanAICollaboration #ResponsibleAI #TinyAgent
